data.title: Calorie Restriction With Leucine Supplementation in Postmenopausal Women
data.brief_summary: The purpose of this study is to determine whether consuming additional leucine during calorie restriction induced weight loss has beneficial or harmful effects on multi-organ (liver, muscle, adipose tissue) insulin sensitivity, colonocyte proliferation rates, the gut microbiome, muscle mass and function, and bone mineral density in obese, postmenopausal women.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Obese with body mass index (BMI) between 30 and 40 kg/m2
* Postmenopausal
* Sedentary (i.e., less than 1.5 hours of exercise per week)

Exclusion Criteria:

* Individuals with diabetes and/or uncontrolled hypertension
* Individuals with hepatitis B and/or C

endpoints: Change in bone mineral density and bone mineral content
